blended.narrative: Keystone is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Mild temps with highs near 44°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 6" over the past week. Current depth: 37".
